CustomField.formula: IF ( DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate) >= DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate)),3,1) + ( 14- CASE( MOD(DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate)),3,1) - DATE (1900,1,4),4) , 0,4,MOD(DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate)),3,1) - DATE (1900,1,4),4)) ) && DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate) < DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate)),11,1) + ( 4- CASE( MOD(DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate)),11,1) - DATE (1900,1,4),4) , 0,4,MOD(DATE ( YEAR (DATEVALUE(LastModifiedDate)),11,1) - DATE (1900,1,4),4)) ), MID( TEXT(LastModifiedDate- 4/24) , 6, 2)+"/"+MID( TEXT(LastModifiedDate- 4/24) , 9, 2)+"/"+MID( TEXT(LastModifiedDate- 4/24) , 0, 4) + " "+MID(TEXT(LastModifiedDate- 4/24), 11, 9) , MID( TEXT(LastModifiedDate- 5/24) , 6, 2)+"/"+MID( TEXT(LastModifiedDate- 5/24) , 9, 2)+"/"+MID( TEXT(LastModifiedDate- 5/24) , 0, 4) + " "+MID(TEXT(LastModifiedDate- 5/24), 11, 9) )
CustomField.label: Last Modified Date
